title: Curation
subtitle: Validate where each data point comes from and how it is calculated. A KPI only appears in dashboards once its criteria is approved.

filters.hint: The visible KPI only uses approved data.

empty: No items to curate with this filter.

criteria_modal.title: New criteria
criteria_modal.source_placeholder: Jira, Google Sheet, DB, Manual, API...
criteria_modal.source_hint: Where the data comes from: system, tool or process that generates it.
criteria_modal.config_placeholder: JQL, SQL, URL or sheet name
criteria_modal.config_hint: Exact query or reference to obtain the data (e.g.: Jira filter, sheet name).
criteria_modal.criteria_placeholder: E.g.: Sum of closed tickets with High priority in the period, excluding cancelled ones.
criteria_modal.criteria_hint: Explain how the KPI value is calculated. This text is recorded for audit purposes and must be clear enough for someone else to replicate it.
criteria_modal.validation_error: Fill in assignment, source and criteria before submitting.

review_modal.comment_placeholder_reject: E.g.: The indicated source does not match the agreed system.
review_modal.comment_placeholder_request: E.g.: Missing date range specification for the calculation.
review_modal.comment_required_hint: Required: explain the reason so the responsible person can correct it.
